changeSet.author: colvir-ms
changeSet.sql: update "payment" set "payment_result" = CASE "payment_result" WHEN 'CANCELED' THEN 'CANCELED' WHEN 'NOTPAID' THEN 'NOT_PAID' WHEN 'PAID' THEN 'PAID' ELSE "payment_result" END where "payment_result" in ('CANCELED', 'NOTPAID', 'PAID');

changeSet.author: colvir-ms
changeSet.sql: update "requirement" set "payment_strategy_000_account_selection_rule" = CASE "payment_strategy_000_account_selection_rule" WHEN 'CURRENCY' THEN 'CURRENCY' WHEN 'ORDER' THEN 'ORDER' WHEN 'UNDEFINED' THEN 'UNDEFINED' ELSE "payment_strategy_000_account_selection_rule" END where "payment_strategy_000_account_selection_rule" in ('CURRENCY', 'ORDER', 'UNDEFINED');
